traits.summary: Advantage on saves against Charmed and immunity to magical sleep.
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Charmed condition, and magic can't put you to sleep.

traits.summary: Gain proficiency in two skills of your choice.
traits.description: You gain proficiency in two skills of your choice.

traits.summary: Gain one extra Origin feat at character creation.
traits.description: You gain one extra Origin feat at character creation, the same type of early versatility that Humans receive.

flavorText: Half-elves often bridge cultures, languages, and traditions with unusual ease. Their mixed heritage can grant social flexibility and a broad worldview. In many stories, they become translators between worlds—literal or metaphorical.
roleplayNotes: Explore which communities shaped you and where you feel most at home.
